description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that runs on push to main, on pull requests, and on repository creation. Use a matrix job strategy to test across multiple Python versions and operating systems, including ubuntu-20.04, windows-2022, and macos-10.15. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the specified Python version, install dependencies, build the project, and run tests in both C extension and pure Python fallback environments. Additionally, publish wheels to TestPyPI when a tag is pushed.
